cards.back: A large lexical database for the English language, providing semantic relationships between words.
A lexical database that represents words in terms of frames, which are clusters of words that share a common meaning.
A program or algorithm that reduces words to their base or root form, known as a stem or inflectional morpheme.
A program that identifies the grammatical category of each word in a sentence, such as noun, verb, adjective, etc.
A large, annotated collection of text data used to train and test natural language processing models, such as the Penn Corpus or the Brown Corpus.
